name: chart-area-interactive
visual_summary: Chart Area Interactive is a visual representation of data that responds to user interactions. It showcases a chart that can be zoomed and hovered over to reveal more information. Developers would use this component to display dynamic data trends in real-time.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-area-interactive
Description: Chart Area Interactive is a visual representation of data that responds to user interactions. It showcases a chart that can be zoomed and hovered over to reveal more information. Developers would use this component to display dynamic data trends in real-time.
Style: 
Interactions: animated, hover, scrollable
Tags: chart, interactive, data-visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
